name: BitFun
description: BitFun is a next-generation AI assistant with built-in Code Agent and Cowork Agent. It has memory, personality, and the ability to evolve over time. You can remotely control the desktop through mobile QR pairing or Telegram / Feishu bots, send instructions, and watch each execution step in real time while the Agent keeps working in the background.
summaryZh: BitFun is a next-generation AI assistant with built-in Code Agent and Cowork Agent. It has memory, personality, and the ability to evolve over time. You can remotely control the desktop through mobile QR pairing or Telegram / Feishu bots, send instructions, and watch each execution step in real time while the Agent keeps working in the background. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
